title: The Place He Awakened
overview: In the year 2050, engineer Derrida Yvain becomes aware of a bug in a new line of androids developed by his company. His attempts to avert disaster are blocked off at every turn, and soon, he and his friend Nathan are forced to run for their lives!

title: Who Is Left in the World
overview: Derrida awakens from cryostasis ten years in the future, to find a world in ruins filled with rampaging androids. After being saved by a man named Vidaux, Derrida decides to fulfill his promise to Nathan by finding and protecting his daughter, Mage.

title: Those Who've Come Together
overview: Derrida stops by Nathan's old house, where he runs into Mage's best friend Yuri, who is now a young woman. Yuri devastates Derrida by informing him that Mage is dead... but his grief is cut short when they're attacked by a woman in black.

title: The Time Leaper
overview: To search for more clues about to Mage's whereabouts, Derrida and Vidaux infiltrate company building of Rebuild, the creator of the out-of-control androids. But to do so, they'll first need to navigate the underground tunnels and gain access to the city.

title: That Which Is Not Wholly Abandoned
overview: The group traces Mage's steps to a museum in the city of Vanfort. Derrida is struck by memories of visiting this place with his father when he was a child, and the strong memory spurs a sudden leap back to himself ten years before...

title: Those Who Search, Those Who Conceal
overview: Damages to Graham from repeated battles have taken their toll. While Vidaux walks to the city for repairs, Derrida and Yuri spend the night in an abandoned home, where Derrida begins experimenting with the mysterious "time ride" phenomenon.

title: The Loves of Each
overview: Derrida and Vidaux come to a new town looking for Yuri. But it turns out her kidnappers are from the government, and the conspiracy goes even deeper than expected...

title: The Fate of Time
overview: A trap set by Donna ends up leading the group to the man they're searching for. Can Derrida use time rides to save them all from their merciless pursuer?

title: Strong Bonds
overview: Vidaux's past with Mayuka is explored as the team makes a brutal charge through a DZ graveyard.

title: Those Who Have Let Go
overview: Five years ago after Derrida's tragedy, a reckless experiment gives birth to the entity known as Donna.

title: A Quiet Place
overview: Derrida and his friends make a final desperate run to the telescope facility where they believe Mage to be.

title: Everything Goes Back to Where It Belongs
overview: With the government closing in, Derrida rushes to find Mage, learn the truth, and make a final time ride to avert disaster.
